response_text:
ENTITY Passenger
PK passenger_id
ATTR passenger_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR airline_id : varchar : FK
ATTR departure_airport_id : varchar : FK
ATTR arrival_airport_id : varchar : FK
ATTR aircraft_registration : varchar : FK
ATTR status_code : varchar : FK
ATTR scheduled_departure_time : time
ATTR actual_arrival_date : date
ATTR actual_arrival_time : time
ENTITY Seat
PK seat_number, flight_id
ATTR seat_number : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR passenger_id : varchar : FK
ENTITY Airline
PK airline_id
ATTR airline_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar
ENTITY Airport
PK airport_id
ATTR airport_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR city_id : varchar : FK
ENTITY City
PK city_id
ATTR city_id : varchar : PK
ATTR city_name : varchar
ENTITY Aircraft
PK aircraft_registration
ATTR aircraft_registration : varchar : PK
ATTR aircraft_model_id : varchar : FK
ENTITY AircraftModel
PK aircraft_model_id
ATTR aircraft_model_id : varchar : PK
ATTR model_name : varchar
ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status_description : varchar
ENTITY Crew
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR crew_role_id : varchar : FK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ENTITY CrewAssignment
PK flight_id, crew_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK : FK
REL Seat -> Passenger : 0..N -> 0..1 : FK=passenger_id
REL Seat -> Flight : 0..N -> 1 : FK=flight_id
REL Flight -> Airline : 0..N -> 1 : FK=airline_id
REL Flight -> DepartureAirport : 0..N -> 1 : FK=departure_airport_id
REL Flight -> ArrivalAirport : 0..N -> 1 : FK=arrival_airport_id
REL Flight -> Aircraft : 0..N -> 1 : FK=aircraft_registration
REL Flight -> FlightStatus : 0..N -> 1 : FK=status_code
REL Airport -> City : 0..N -> 1 : FK=city_id
REL Aircraft -> AircraftModel : 0..N -> 1 : FK=aircraft_model_id
REL CrewAssignment -> Flight : 0..N -> 1 : FK=flight_id
REL CrewAssignment -> Crew : 0..N -> 1 : FK=crew_id
